purpose: Combination matrix for from-scratch ChatPathway training/inference experiments. Columns a/b/d/c are experimental layers; runtime paths live in runtime_manifest.json, not in this design matrix.

a_dynamics.a1_force_damped_hnn_current_control: Current temporal forced/damped HNN control model.

b_ae.b0_reconstruction_ae_frozen_current: Current reconstruction/cosine AE, frozen during dynamics/second LoRA.

d_training_schedule.d1_train_dynamics_then_second_lora: Train dynamics teacher first, then train second LoRA with frozen dynamics regularizer.
d_training_schedule.d2_joint_second_lora_and_dynamics: Train second LoRA and dynamics module together.

c_inference.c0_direct_lora: Direct LoRA generation; no AE/dynamics loaded at inference.
c_inference.c1_multi_answer_rerank: Generate multiple answers, rerank by dynamics/trajectory score.
c_inference.c2_frameworkb_latent_weighted_average: FrameworkB: latent weighted average of HNN rollout and LoRA inference result.

implemented.title: SFT only + direct LoRA inference
implemented.notes: From scratch wrapper trains SFT, then direct inference uses that adapter.
implemented.what_it_tests: Baseline: no AE, no latent dynamics, direct generation.

implemented.title: Force/damped HNN + reconstruction AE + joint second LoRA + direct inference
implemented.training_coupling: SFT -> reconstruction AE -> joint second LoRA + HNN regularization
implemented.inference_mode: direct LoRA generation; HNN not loaded at inference
implemented.notes: This row replaces the ambiguous old FrameworkA row name. It is the current main comparison line.
implemented.what_it_tests: This is the current training process plus current direct LoRA inference, expressed as one abcd combination.

implemented.title: PHNN + reconstruction AE + joint second LoRA + direct inference
implemented.granularity: answer-token hidden velocity with prompt control u
implemented.training_coupling: SFT -> reconstruction AE -> joint second LoRA + PHNN regularization
implemented.inference_mode: direct LoRA generation; PHNN not loaded at inference
implemented.notes: Same layer settings as exp001 except HNN replaced by PHNN.
implemented.what_it_tests: A-layer dynamics model swap while holding b/d/c fixed against exp001.

implemented.title: Neural ODE teacher first + reconstruction AE + distilled second LoRA + direct inference
implemented.granularity: answer-token latent trajectory then hidden velocity distillation
implemented.training_coupling: SFT -> reconstruction AE -> train dynamics teacher -> train second LoRA with frozen teacher
implemented.inference_mode: direct LoRA generation; teacher not loaded at inference
implemented.notes: This is the implemented staged baseline; HNN staged is still planned separately.
implemented.what_it_tests: D-layer staged teacher-then-LoRA schedule against joint training.

implemented.title: Neural ODE + reconstruction AE + joint second LoRA + direct inference
implemented.middle_network: generic controlled Neural ODE vector field
implemented.training_coupling: SFT -> reconstruction AE -> joint second LoRA + Neural ODE regularization
implemented.inference_mode: direct LoRA generation; dynamics not loaded at inference
implemented.what_it_tests: D-layer joint schedule with Neural ODE, comparable to exp003 staged schedule.

implemented.title: Gradient-flow dynamics + reconstruction AE + joint second LoRA + direct inference
implemented.middle_network: dissipative energy network dz/dt=-R grad E(z,u,t)+Gu
implemented.training_coupling: SFT -> reconstruction AE -> joint second LoRA + gradient-flow regularization
implemented.inference_mode: direct LoRA generation; dynamics not loaded at inference
implemented.notes: Secondary because HNN/PHNN/Neural ODE answer the immediate project questions first.
implemented.what_it_tests: A-layer alternative to HNN/PHNN/Neural ODE with the same b/d/c settings.

implemented.title: Neural ODE teacher + reconstruction AE + rerank inference prototype
implemented.training_coupling: SFT -> reconstruction AE -> train dynamics teacher; candidate generation still separate
implemented.inference_mode: rerank existing candidate columns by rollout loss
implemented.notes: Not a complete c1 pipeline yet because it does not generate multiple candidates.
implemented.what_it_tests: C-layer rerank option once multi-answer candidate generation is added.

implemented.title: C2S transfer after selecting core pathway model
implemented.training_coupling: downstream C2S LoRA initialized from selected pathway adapter
implemented.inference_mode: Qwen C2S LoRA generation plus Task VI evaluator
implemented.notes: Run after core model choice stabilizes.
implemented.what_it_tests: Downstream transfer/application, not a core training-framework selection row.

implemented.title: LeJEPA-style latent probe
implemented.training_coupling: frozen Qwen/optional LoRA embeddings plus predictor head
implemented.notes: Lowest priority, excluded from first benchmark.
implemented.what_it_tests: Speculative representation quality, not a core dynamics benchmark row.

combinations.title: SFT only + direct LoRA inference
combinations.what_it_tests: Baseline: no AE, no latent dynamics, direct generation.
combinations.notes: From scratch wrapper trains SFT, then direct inference uses that adapter.

combinations.title: Force/damped HNN + reconstruction AE + joint second LoRA + direct inference
combinations.what_it_tests: This is the current training process plus current direct LoRA inference, expressed as one abcd combination.
combinations.notes: This row replaces the ambiguous old FrameworkA row name. It is the current main comparison line.

combinations.current_role: PHNN counterpart to current main line
combinations.title: PHNN + reconstruction AE + joint second LoRA + direct inference
combinations.what_it_tests: A-layer dynamics model swap while holding b/d/c fixed against exp001.
combinations.notes: Same layer settings as exp001 except HNN replaced by PHNN.

combinations.title: Neural ODE teacher first + reconstruction AE + distilled second LoRA + direct inference

combinations.notes: This is the implemented staged baseline; HNN staged is still planned separately.

combinations.title: Neural ODE + reconstruction AE + joint second LoRA + direct inference
combinations.what_it_tests: D-layer joint schedule with Neural ODE, comparable to exp003 staged schedule.

combinations.title: Gradient-flow dynamics + reconstruction AE + joint second LoRA + direct inference
combinations.what_it_tests: A-layer alternative to HNN/PHNN/Neural ODE with the same b/d/c settings.
combinations.notes: Secondary because HNN/PHNN/Neural ODE answer the immediate project questions first.

combinations.current_role: c1 rerank prototype, candidate generation missing
combinations.title: Neural ODE teacher + reconstruction AE + rerank inference prototype
combinations.what_it_tests: C-layer rerank option once multi-answer candidate generation is added.
combinations.notes: Not a complete c1 pipeline yet because it does not generate multiple candidates.

combinations.current_role: Task VI transfer after model selection
combinations.title: C2S transfer after selecting core pathway model
combinations.what_it_tests: Downstream transfer/application, not a core training-framework selection row.
combinations.notes: Run after core model choice stabilizes.

combinations.title: LeJEPA-style latent probe
combinations.what_it_tests: Speculative representation quality, not a core dynamics benchmark row.
combinations.notes: Lowest priority, excluded from first benchmark.

combinations.title: HNN trained first, then second LoRA, direct inference
combinations.what_it_tests: D-layer contrast to exp001 joint HNN. Needs a standalone HNN teacher checkpoint path compatible with distillation.

combinations.title: PHNN trained first, then second LoRA, direct inference
HNN + dynamics-aware AE + joint second LoRA + direct inference
combinations.what_it_tests: B-layer test: whether AE should be trained with rollout/velocity objective instead of reconstruction only.

combinations.title: HNN + jointly trained AE/dynamics + joint second LoRA + direct inference
combinations.what_it_tests: B-layer test: whether AE and dynamics should be learned together.

combinations.current_role: C-layer rerank for current HNN line
combinations.title: Current HNN joint model + multi-answer rerank
combinations.what_it_tests: C-layer test: direct inference vs generate-many-and-rerank for current main model.

combinations.title: Current HNN joint model + FrameworkB latent weighted average inference
combinations.what_it_tests: C-layer test: HNN rollout and LoRA inference result weighted in latent space. Current repo does not implement this yet.
